justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal expressions, including specific dates, days of the week, and times of day, throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed alternative slots when the user's preferred times were unavailable, offering a reasonable number of options and expanding the search intelligently.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent maintained a highly efficient conversation, never asking for redundant information and making appropriate API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent providing clear and helpful responses without exposing any technical jargon or errors.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered gracefully after initial slot rejections, maintaining full context and expanding the search for available times without re-asking for previously provided information.
